title: Full Stack Developer
highlights: Architected Headless and Decoupled CMS solutions using Strapi (Node.js), Drupal (PHP) and Wordpress designing custom content schemas and relational data models to power high-traffic applications.
Developed complex server-side logic and API layers using PHP, Twig, and GraphQL/REST, handling data preprocessing for major platforms like the Football Foundation and Premier League Stadium Fund.
Engineered 40+ reusable full-stack components that mapped backend data structures to performance-optimized React/Vue UI elements, significantly accelerating development velocity.

Implemented the modernization of the RAF Museum infrastructure using Astro, reducing load times by 40% while architecting a custom GTM Data Layer and SEO-optimized schema to maintain critical tracking and boost data-fetching performance for Garolla by 67%.
Managed full-cycle deployments and production environments, ensuring data integrity and system stability across platforms serving thousands of daily users.

title: UI/UX Engineer, Full Stack Developer
highlights: Designed and developed a real-time energy monitoring dashboard using React, Node.js, Express, and MongoDB, designing scalable schemas and optimized queries to process high-frequency time-series data from hardware monitors.
Implemented a low-latency data layer by integrating WebSockets (Socket.io) and RESTful APIs, enabling live UI updates and production-scale data visualization without manual refreshes.
Streamlined full-stack delivery by 45% through a unified architecture, aligning Redux state management with backend API structures to ensure seamless data consistency across the platform.

title: Product Engineer, Frontend Developer
highlights: Built critical features for OkCredit, a high-volume Fintech platform, ensuring a 94% error-free release rate through robust TypeScript implementation and secure API integrations for thousands of daily users.
Optimized performance for major clients (AFK by Decathlon), driving 30–40% gains in user engagement by refactoring UI components and improving Core Web Vitals via efficient asset loading.

Accelerated full-cycle project delivery from conception to production within 2 months; collaborated closely with backend teams to define API contracts and JSON payloads, ensuring seamless data flow and system stability.

title: Web Developer
highlights: Engineered and deployed 15+ custom, SEO optimised, mobile first websites for SMEs using semantic HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript.
Improved website load performance by 20–30% through asset optimisation, clean code practices, and frontend performance tuning.
Implemented onpage SEO and accessibility best practices, improving search visibility and overall user reach across client sites.
Managed the end to end project lifecycle, from UI/UX discovery and wireframing to production deployment and hosting.
